idea-plugin.name: Git Worktree Manager
idea-plugin.description:
Simplify Git worktree management in Android Studio and IntelliJ IDEA.

Create, list, and delete Git worktrees with just a few clicks. Perfect for Android developers who need to work on multiple features simultaneously without the overhead of switching branches or maintaining multiple clones.

Features:
  • Create new worktrees (new branch or existing local branch)
  • View all worktrees in a convenient tool window
  • Optionally copy selected ignored files into the new worktree
  • Push worktree branches to remote
  • Copy worktree path/branch/commit to clipboard
  • Open worktree directories in the IDE Terminal (requires the Terminal plugin)
  • Reveal worktree directories in the OS file manager
  • Delete worktrees with one click
  • Automatically open worktrees in new IDE windows
